Welcome to the BOSC Community Library. A: Tukwanirizza mu Tterekero ly'ebitabo erya BOSC Community. Ettabi eppya ery'ebikozesebwa mu kusoma ebitegekeddwa amasomero n'ebitongole eby'olukale mu Uganda yonna.
BOSC Community Library helps schools, un: BOSC Community Library eyamba amasomero, amatendekero, n'ebifo by'okuyiga okutereka ebikozesebwa mu kusoma nga software yaayo nzigule, esobola okwekebejjebwa, okuvvuunulwa, n'okulongoosebwa abawagizi b'omu kitundu.
GPLv3 licensing, contribution guidelines: Layisinsi ya GPLv3, amateeka g'okuyambako, n'ebyokulabirako by'ensonga bikuuma enteekateeka nga yevunaanyizibwa.
English and Luganda language support mak: Olungereza n'Oluganda biyamba etterekero okukozesebwa obulungi mu bitongole bya Uganda.
The project includes a code of conduct,: Enteekateeka erimu amateeka g'empisa, ekitabo ky'okuyambako, ebyokulabirako by'ensonga, n'olukalala lwa pull request okuyamba abawagizi abapya okutegeeza obuzibu, okuleeta ebirowoozo, n'okwekeneenya enkyukakyuka.
